title: Open work permit for Indigenous U.S. citizens with Canadian family - Canada.ca
content:
## You need a work permit
Based on your answers, you may be eligible for an open work permit (OWP) .

## Eligibility requirements
You may be eligible to apply for an OWP under a temporary public policy if you’re an Indigenous person who
- is a member of a Federally Recognized Tribe in the United States or a citizen of the Manitoba Métis Federation , and
- was born in or is a citizen of the United States, and
- has an anchor member of your family who is a Canadian citizen, permanent resident or person registered under the Indian Act, and lives in Canada
- is a Canadian citizen, permanent resident or person registered under the Indian Act, and
Find out how to apply for these temporary measures.
